title: Day 11 Lesson 3 - Video Repetition
html:
The focus of this repetition is on these three sentences:  

Sentence 1 - おとうとさんは　えが　じょうず　ですか。 = Is your younger brother good at drawing?

Sentence 2 - はい、じょうず　です。= Yes, he is.

Sentence 3 - いいえ、じょうず　じゃ ありません。= No, he isn't.

How to use this lesson - When the repeat message shows and the video pauses, please repeat the sentence you have just heard.  Keep practising until you can repeat perfectly!
